actionUnits.condition: Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered on Floor to test IfPuzzle.ObjectSnapped. MonoBehaviour (fileID: 515040909, guid: a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b) is IfPuzzle with fields correctPiece: {fileID: 0} and linkedIfManager: {fileID: 0} (both currently unassigned). Precondition: Floor must have an XRSocketInteractor component (likely component fileID: 515040908) and both fields must be assigned. When an XRGrabInteractable whose transform.name equals correctPiece.name is snapped into the socket, IfPuzzle should invoke linkedIfManager.correctPiece().

Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectExited on Floor to test IfPuzzle.ObjectRemoved. Precondition: Floor has XRSocketInteractor and linkedIfManager assigned in IfPuzzle (fileID: 515040909). When the previously snapped object is removed from the socket, IfPuzzle should invoke linkedIfManager.removedPiece().
